'''dabusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicholsonite|nicholsonite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicholsonite|nicholsonite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dabusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæbisith|dæbisith]] || [[word:dæbisij|dæbisij]] || [[word:dæbisish|dæbisish]] || [[word:dæbisi|dæbisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dabubusuth|dabubusuth]] || [[word:dabubusuj|dabubusuj]] || [[word:dabubusush|dabubusush]] || [[word:dabubusu|dabubusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dabusuth|dabusuth]] || [[word:dabusuj|dabusuj]] || [[word:dabusush|dabusush]] || [[word:dabusu|dabusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dabufsuth|dabufsuth]] || [[word:dabufsuj|dabufsuj]] || [[word:dabufsush|dabufsush]] || [[word:dabufsuf|dabufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dabusuthu|dabusuthu]] || [[word:dabusuju|dabusuju]] || [[word:dabusushu|dabusushu]] || [[word:dabusuku|dabusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dabusuth|dabusuth]] || [[word:dabusuj|dabusuj]] || [[word:dabusush|dabusush]] || [[word:dabusu|dabusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dabusuthul|dabusuthul]] || [[word:dabusujul|dabusujul]] || [[word:dabusushul|dabusushul]] || [[word:dabusukul|dabusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dabusuthuthu|dabusuthuthu]] || [[word:dabusujuju|dabusujuju]] || [[word:dabusushushu|dabusushushu]] || [[word:dabusuku|dabusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dabusuthun|dabusuthun]] || [[word:dabusujun|dabusujun]] || [[word:dabusushun|dabusushun]] || [[word:dabusukun|dabusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dabusuthuoro|dabusuthuoro]] || [[word:dabusujuoro|dabusujuoro]] || [[word:dabusushuoro|dabusushuoro]] || [[word:dabusukuoro|dabusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
